title: How high is it?
description: Shows information about fall distance (fall and mace damage) on hud
body:
Shows information about fall distance (fall and mace damage) on Hud. Shows how far the player has fallen already and the total distance to the block below the player.

Position on hud is configurable.

![Falling with Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rd1DbjVl/images/32844d4c3bcf856a278ea3c557939efcf3a6154b.gif)
